title: AtlasIT Evidence Schema
description: Schema for evidence artifacts generated by autonomous agents and workflows

trace_id.description: UUID v4 uniquely identifying this evidence trace

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when evidence was generated

tenant_id.description: Tenant identifier for multi-tenant evidence tracking

subject_id.description: Subject of the evidence (e.g., user_id, resource_id)

decision_ref.description: Reference to routing or approval decision UUID

severity.description: Severity level of the evidence event

agent.description: Agent or workflow that generated this evidence

result.description: Result of the action or validation

metadata.description: Additional metadata specific to the evidence type
